overview.description: Počítačová škola GOPAS is the largest IT training and certification school in the Czech and Slovak market, offering over 2,000 courses including AI, cybersecurity, cloud, and Microsoft technologies.
overview.description_long: GOPAS (Počítačová škola GOPAS, a.s.) is the largest provider of IT education and training in the Czech Republic and Slovakia. Founded in 1992, it serves nearly 30,000 students annually across its locations in Prague, Brno, and Bratislava. GOPAS offers more than 2,000 courses covering a wide range of IT domains: artificial intelligence (AI for users, managers, programmers, AI security), cybersecurity, cloud computing, networking, data, Microsoft 365/Azure, programming, and professional certifications (Microsoft, Cisco, EC-Council, CompTIA, VMware, AWS and others). The school holds ISO 9001 and ISO 27001 certifications and was the first Czech training center to achieve Microsoft Gold Certified Partner status for learning solutions. GOPAS also organises major IT conferences (TechEd, HackerFest, JavaDays, JS Days) and participates in government-funded digital upskilling programmes (MPSV DIGI pro firmu, Jsem v kurzu).
overview.tagline: Největší poskytovatel IT školení na českém a slovenském trhu

history.origin_story: GOPAS was founded in 1992 and legally incorporated as GOPAS, a.s. on April 1, 1996. It grew from a small Prague-based computer training centre to the market-leading IT education provider in Czech Republic and Slovakia.

key_milestones.event: SCO Gold Award of the Year – second best authorised training centre in Europe, Asia and Africa
Gained Microsoft ATEC (Authorised Training Education Center) authorisation
GOPAS, a.s. legally incorporated; ISO 9001 certification obtained; MŠMT accreditation for IT requalification
First training centre in CZ/SK to achieve Microsoft Certified Gold Partner for Learning Solutions
Founded subsidiary GOPAS SR, a.s. in Bratislava
First in CZ: Microsoft Partner Gold Learning
Microsoft Partner of the Year 2020 for Learning; pivoted to online courses during COVID-19
ISO 27001 certification; launched MPSV DIGI pro firmu programme
Relocated Prague HQ to Na Strži 63, Praha-Krč (24 computer classrooms)

leadership.name: Ing. Petr Daniel
leadership.role: Předseda správní rady (Chairman of the Board)

leadership.name: Ing. Ladislav Bartoníček
leadership.role: Místopředseda správní rady (Vice Chairman of the Board)

awards: Microsoft Partner of the Year 2020 for Learning
EC-Council ATC Circle of Excellence (multiple years: 2012–2019)
EC-Council William Ischanoe Circle of Excellence Instructor (2014–2019)
SCO Gold Award of the Year 1993 (2nd best authorised centre in Europe/Asia/Africa)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: GOPAS's core business of IT training faces real disruption from AI-powered learning platforms and AI coding/productivity tools that reduce training needs. However, the company's moat lies in its authorised certification training (Microsoft, Cisco, EC-Council, CompTIA) where official vendor certification requires formally approved training centres, providing an institutional buffer that generic AI tutoring cannot easily replace.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: IT education and corporate upskilling is an established, persistent market with consistent demand, especially as digital transformation accelerates. GOPAS is the clear market leader in Czech Republic and Slovakia with 30+ years of operations, 30,000 students/year, and government-backed requalification programmes providing a stable revenue base.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: GOPAS is a self-sustaining 30+ year old enterprise with diversified revenue (courses, certifications, conferences, government MPSV programmes) and zero known external funding dependency. The ISO-certified operations and sustained market leadership signal a profitable, stable business.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: While GOPAS has a strong market position, brand, and certification moat, the medium-term threat from AI-powered self-service learning and declining demand for certain IT courses (as AI automates tasks) is real. The offset is strong institutional relationships with certification vendors and government upskilling contracts.

metadata.notes: GOPAS is an IT training/education company, not an AI builder. It is included in the CNAIP ecosystem as a key provider of AI skills training in Czech Republic. The company offers dedicated AI course tracks (AI for users, managers, programmers, AI security). Founded 1992; legal entity GOPAS a.s. registered April 1, 1996. Subsidiary GOPAS SR a.s. operates in Slovakia.
